Amana iowa. Just north of the 4 way stop on hi way 151 and 20th trail. Large public domain apple tree. There are many other great apple, pear and peach trees around Amana. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.

Amana iowa. Just north of the 4 way stop on hi way 151 and 220th trail. Large public domain apple tree. There are many other great apple, pear and peach trees around Amana. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
